last_item: Band C: Spinner → shadcn Spinner. Recomposed the ui.tsx Spinner({label}) loading wrapper over the shadcn Spinner primitive (Loader2Icon + animate-spin), keeping its public API + muted status row, now Tailwind semantic tokens (flex items-center gap-2.5 px-1 py-6 text-muted-foreground). All 14 callsites (App + 9 views) untouched. Deleted dead .loading/.spinner/@keyframes spin CSS (spin had no other user). A11y: row is an explicit role=status live region (aria-live=polite, aria-atomic=true), inner icon decorative (role=presentation + aria-hidden) to avoid nested role=status — props spread last in the primitive so the wrapper overrides without editing the shared primitive. Added Spinner tests to ui.test.tsx (status role + label + data-slot composition, default-label fallback).
last_result: green: typecheck, 95 web tests (was 93), build, go build. ui-heuristics-reviewer flagged (1) role=status div may be a dead live region → added aria-live/aria-atomic; (2) nested role=status collision between wrapper + primitive svg → suppressed inner icon to role=presentation. Declined editing the primitive's defaults (finding 3) — wrapper override via props-spread-last is cleaner and keeps the primitive safe for standalone use. Next in band C: Modal→Dialog, then ConfirmDialog→AlertDialog, Toast→sonner. Deferred to band E: --info-soft collides with --primary-soft (logged in backlog).
notes: PURE UI/UX LOOP. The prior 57-iteration hardening track is COMPLETE and shipped as v0.6.0. This track rebuilds the web panel on shadcn/ui — see PROMPT.md + UI-RULES.md + backlog.md. The operator EXPLICITLY authorized the shadcn/Tailwind/Radix dependency tree, overriding the earlier rule-4/5 objection — do NOT re-litigate whether to adopt shadcn; it is required. Start at band A (scaffold), then B (shell), C (primitives), D (views one at a time), E (cleanup). Never touch Go/business logic — frontend only.
north_star: Every view in the indiepg panel rebuilt with shadcn/ui — clean, simple, consistent — with no hand-rolled component where a shadcn one exists, behavior identical, all tests green.
